changes.text: Introduced a redesigned update system with a custom update dialog and integrated changelog viewer
Added support for importing SDA-encrypted mafiles with automatic manifest detection
Grouped market confirmations can now be expanded to reveal individual items
Added SHA256 checksum verification for downloaded update packages
Export feature now trims input automatically to prevent issues caused by invisible characters or extra spaces
Improved update experience with 'Remind later' and 'Skip version' options
Added visual update indicator and manual 'Check for updates' action
Expanded localization support with Spanish, Turkish and Kazakh languages
Read the full release notes for NebulaAuth 1.8.3
